M-Scale Target Cost



Should you use target cost? I only generally run this on funnels with short conversion paths, like Lead Gen (click from ad > view lander > sign up) due to the lack of volume you’ll often find with longer funnels (like a typical Ecom funnel). 



The best performance I’ve seen was for mobile app install campaigns which alongside lead gen provide stability and volume once you’ve been through all the testing steps from above.



Note: assuming you get the right target cost, as with cost cap, increasing budget becomes a lot more stable than the other auto-bid and bid cap because Facebook knows the boundary to invest within.



I test the TARGET COST in a similar way to COST CAP using the 75%, 100%, 125% method and using the same steps as BID CAP above in setup and operating.



Note: TARGET COST is less likely to fluctuate daily so it’s great for those wanting the easy life; though expect a loss of volume and potentially seeing ad sets stalling (zero delivery) so use with caution. If your ad set is failing to deliver it’s usually because your bid is too low.
